display.purpose: Landing page and major role headers.

motion.name: standard-fade
motion.purpose: Default for state changes and entrances.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.55 0.18 270); color: white; padding: 14px 24px; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: filter 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.1); }

components.name: Text Input
components.css: .ds-input { background: oklch(1 0 0 / 0.03); border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 0.1); border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px 16px; color: white; font-size: 15px; width: 100%; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.55 0.18 270 / 0.5); }

narrative.overview: Smart Workforce Platform is a professional tool for managing labor, money, and time. The aesthetic is 'Restrained Modern'—it prioritizes clarity and speed over decorative flair.
dos: Do use OKLCH for color definitions
